project.name: RideRelay
project.description: Backend APIs, allocation rules, persistence, database automation, and verification for RideRelay.

backend.purpose: RideRelay HTTP API and database integration

files.server.js: Small HTTP application entry and API dispatcher.
files.config/db.js: Stable database entry used by the server and modular backend.
files.controllers/userController.js: Rider and Captain profile update handlers.
files.middleware/auth.js: Password hashing, signed login tokens, authentication, and authorization.
files.models/Ride.js: Ride status and seat lifecycle definitions.
files.services/rideService.js: Fare, matching, and seat-allocation business rules.
files.database/schema.sql: Backend-local PostgreSQL schema copy for inspection and sharing.
files.db.js: Compatibility persistence implementation used behind config/db.js.
files.locations.js: Hyderabad fixed pickup hub loading, searching, distance calculations, creation, and updates.
files.postgres-projector.js: Projects RideRelay working state into normalized PostgreSQL tables.
files.postgres-reader.js: Reads normalized PostgreSQL tables back into the RideRelay API state.
files..env.supabase.example: Safe Supabase Session Pooler configuration template.

scripts.db-status.js: Reports PostgreSQL connection, table count, and projection status.
scripts.deploy-supabase.js: Runs migration, projection, verification, and status checks for Supabase.
scripts.migrate.js: Applies schema, migrations, and seed files safely.
scripts.project-db.js: Projects current RideRelay records into normalized PostgreSQL tables.
scripts.verify-db.js: Confirms RideRelay and PostgreSQL records match.

database.purpose: Production PostgreSQL schema, migrations, and seed records

files.schema.sql: Creates the normalized RideRelay production tables.
files.README.md: Database setup, migration, and read-cutover documentation.

migrations.003_projection_identity.sql: Adds stable source identity for normalized projection.

seed.hyderabad_hubs.sql: Seeds Hyderabad RideRelay fixed pickup hubs.

githubWorkflow.purpose: Automatically deploys and verifies database changes against Supabase.

businessRules.authentication: Passwords are hashed and successful login/signup returns an expiring signed token.
businessRules.authorization: Rider, Captain, and admin access is checked for protected APIs.
businessRules.allocation: Requests must match an active Captain route and cannot exceed vacant seats.
businessRules.seatLifecycle: Seats are held after acceptance and released after decline or ride completion.
businessRules.payment: Payment is accepted only after ride completion and duplicate payments are blocked.
businessRules.review: Review is accepted only after payment and duplicate reviews are blocked.
businessRules.fare: RideRelay fuel sharing uses a base rate of Rs 9 per kilometer divided by available seats.
